sql_array: CREATE TABLE xml_data (id INT, content XML);
INSERT INTO xml_data (id, content) VALUES (1, xte_head('book', 'author', 'John Doe', 'publisher', 'OpenAI'));
UPDATE xml_data SET content = xte_head('article', 'title', 'Understanding SQL', 'date', '2023-10-01') WHERE id = 1;
SELECT content FROM xml_data WHERE id = 1;
INSERT INTO xml_data (id, content) VALUES (2, xte_head('note', 'to', 'Alice', 'from', 'Bob', 'heading', 'Reminder'));
